name: Thoracic Spine CT
description: Thoracic spine CT for trauma and bony evaluation

findings.technique: CT of the thoracic spine without contrast was performed.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Vertebral Bodies
sections.content: Thoracic vertebral bodies [show normal alignment / no compression fracture / no bony lesion]. Vertebral body heights are preserved.

sections.name: Pedicles and Pars
sections.content: Pedicles and pars interarticularis [are intact / no fracture / no spondylolysis].

sections.name: Spinal Canal
sections.content: Spinal canal is [patent / no stenosis / no retropulsion].

sections.name: Ribs and Sternum
sections.content: Adjacent ribs and sternum [are intact / no fracture].

impression:
1. No acute thoracic spine fracture.
2. Normal alignment.
3. No acute finding.
